Create file governance/tests/run_receipt_validator_negative_tests.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd()))
from governance.validators.validate_telegram_production_receipt import validate as validate_telegram
from governance.validators.validate_live_runtime_receipt import validate as validate_runtime
from governance.validators.validate_external_claude_audit_result import validate as validate_claude

TESTS = [
    ("telegram_reject_secret", validate_telegram, "governance/tests/fixtures/telegram_receipt_negative_secret.json"),
    ("runtime_reject_mock_as_live", validate_runtime, "governance/tests/fixtures/runtime_receipt_negative_mock_as_live.json"),
    ("claude_reject_self_claim", validate_claude, "governance/tests/fixtures/claude_audit_negative_self_claim.json"),
]


def run():
    results = []
    for name, fn, path in TESTS:
        errors = fn(path)
        results.append({"test": name, "ok": bool(errors), "errors": errors})
    return {"ok": all(item["ok"] for item in results), "release_pass": False, "results": results}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    result = run()
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
